Prediction: No

The current visit record does not provide any explicit evidence of a "Disorder of Lipid Metabolism." While the patient has several significant health issues, including morbid obesity and diabetes, there is no mention of specific lipid disorders such as hypercholesterolemia or hyperlipidemia. The medications listed do not include any lipid-lowering agents or treatments specifically targeting lipid metabolism disorders. Therefore, based on the information provided, I cannot predict that a diagnosis of "Disorders of Lipid Metabolism" will be coded in the patient's next hospital visit.
